meta.name: LIFE_COACH_SITE_SECTION_REGISTRY
meta.rule: The registry binds section text, design intent, image role, asset mode, and QA requirements.

image_rules.image_text_policy: Images support meaning; HTML carries all essential copy.
image_rules.overlay_policy: Only optional transparent labels; no required offer/pricing/CTA text as image-only.

hero.headline: Your coaching work may already have depth. Your website should help people feel it clearly.
hero.body: Clean static landing pages for coaches who need their message, offer, trust cues, and next step to feel clear online.
hero.image_intent: Calm laptop workspace showing a coaching website concept.

problem.headline: Meaningful coaching can still look unclear online.
problem.body: The page may be unfinished, the offer may be scattered, and the next step may not be obvious.
problem.image_intent: Unclear material becoming a clearer website structure.

pathway.headline: A landing page turns your message into a calm client pathway.
pathway.body: It shows who you help, what you offer, why it matters, and what someone should do next — without pressure or confusion.
pathway.image_intent: Message to offer to trust to booking pathway.

includes.headline: The core sections needed to understand and act.
includes.body: Hero, about, offer, process, CTA, and responsive layout.
includes.image_intent: Layered website section panels suggesting the page sections.

tiers.headline: Start with the level that matches your stage.
tiers.body: Begin with a clean static page. Expand only when the core pathway is clear.
tiers.image_intent: Three calm offer cards without readable pricing or package text.

process.headline: From rough page idea to usable website direction.
process.body: Send, clarify, structure, refine, and expand later.
process.image_intent: Creative workflow from idea to page build.

trust.headline: Calm design helps people continue without pressure.
trust.body: People do not only read a coaching website. They feel whether it is safe to continue.

contact.headline: Want a mockup of your page direction?
contact.body: Send your current page, notes, or coaching offer idea.
contact.image_intent: Inviting contact scene with laptop, notebook, and next-step request.
